name: Quinoa Italian Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees if baking.
2. In a large non-stick skillet, sauté the onions and garlic until cooked. Add the ground meat or Harvest Burger and water, tomato sauce, diced tomatoes, salt, oregano, fresh basil, and sugar. Simmer until the ingredients are just cooked, or slightly underdone.
3. In a casserole dish, layer the sauce and quinoa. Dollop some of the ricotta cheese on top, sprinkle with mozzarella cheese, and repeat the layers so that there are two or three layers with sauce on top. Sprinkle Parmesan cheese on top.
4. Microwave for 10 minutes or bake in the oven for about 35 minutes. Serve hot.
